'''lanoyo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:leaching|leaching]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-n-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:leaching|leaching]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| lanoyo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:læneyeth|læneyeth]] || [[word:læneyej|læneyej]] || [[word:læneyesh|læneyesh]] || [[word:læneye|læneye]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:lanonoyoth|lanonoyoth]] || [[word:lanonoyoj|lanonoyoj]] || [[word:lanonoyosh|lanonoyosh]] || [[word:lanonoyo|lanonoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:lanoyoth|lanoyoth]] || [[word:lanoyoj|lanoyoj]] || [[word:lanoyosh|lanoyosh]] || [[word:lanoyo|lanoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:lanofyoth|lanofyoth]] || [[word:lanofyoj|lanofyoj]] || [[word:lanofyosh|lanofyosh]] || [[word:lanofyof|lanofyof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lanoyotho|lanoyotho]] || [[word:lanoyojo|lanoyojo]] || [[word:lanoyosho|lanoyosho]] || [[word:lanoyoko|lanoyoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lanoyoth|lanoyoth]] || [[word:lanoyoj|lanoyoj]] || [[word:lanoyosh|lanoyosh]] || [[word:lanoyo|lanoyo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lanoyothol|lanoyothol]] || [[word:lanoyojol|lanoyojol]] || [[word:lanoyoshol|lanoyoshol]] || [[word:lanoyokol|lanoyokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lanoyothotho|lanoyothotho]] || [[word:lanoyojojo|lanoyojojo]] || [[word:lanoyoshosho|lanoyoshosho]] || [[word:lanoyoko|lanoyoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lanoyothon|lanoyothon]] || [[word:lanoyojon|lanoyojon]] || [[word:lanoyoshon|lanoyoshon]] || [[word:lanoyokon|lanoyokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lanoyothoro|lanoyothoro]] || [[word:lanoyojoro|lanoyojoro]] || [[word:lanoyoshoro|lanoyoshoro]] || [[word:lanoyokoro|lanoyokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|06f9dc6}}
